game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Worms Zone Io Hungry Snake** Players control a worm that continuously moves forward within a large, circular 2D arena, steering its direction by dragging a finger across the screen. The primary objective is to grow the worm's length and mass by consuming scattered colored food pellets, each granting approximately 5 mass points, and the remains of eliminated opponents. A tactical speed boost can be activated by double-tapping or holding the screen, consuming 10 mass points per second, allowing for aggressive maneuvers to encircle and eliminate other player-controlled worms whose heads collide with the player's body. Various temporary power-ups, such as a food magnet or a short invincibility shield, spawn periodically and can be collected to gain strategic advantages for 5-10 seconds. The game ends for a player if their worm's head collides with another worm's body or the arena boundary, with the ultimate goal being to achieve the highest mass and climb the real-time leaderboard.
game_info.description: Control a worm in a circular arena, consuming food pellets to grow longer and heavier. Avoid colliding with arena walls and other worms' bodies. Use boost to outmaneuver opponents and force them into your body. Collect power-ups for temporary advantages. Survive and grow to achieve the highest mass on the leaderboard!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (←↑→↓): Steer the worm's direction
Space: Activate speed boost (consumes 10 mass per second)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and food collection test. Validates that the player worm can navigate the arena and collect food pellets to increase mass.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the arena systematically, collecting visible food pellets. Avoid arena boundaries and AI worms. Continue until reaching a target mass threshold.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The worm successfully moves in all directions, collects food, and increases mass. No collisions with walls or worms occur during basic navigation.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test using optimal aggressive strategy. Tests the full gameplay loop including boost mechanics, power-up collection, and opponent elimination.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively collect food and power-ups while using boost strategically. Target AI worms to eliminate them and consume their remains. Continue until achieving the win condition (highest mass after time limit or eliminating all opponents).
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test successfully reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by achieving the highest mass or eliminating opponents efficiently. All mechanics work correctly including boost, collisions, and power-ups.

TEST_3.test_description: Collision detection and game over test. Validates that the game properly detects collisions with walls and worm bodies, triggering game over.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally navigate towards arena boundaries and AI worm bodies to trigger collision detection. Test both wall collisions and body collisions.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game correctly transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when the player's head collides with walls or worm bodies. Collision detection is accurate and consistent.
TEST_3.description: Collision detection and game over test. Validates that the game properly detects collisions with walls and worm bodies, triggering game over.

TEST_3.expected: Game correctly transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when the player's head collides with walls or worm bodies. Collision detection is accurate and consistent.

TEST_4.test_description: Power-up collection and effects test. Validates that power-ups spawn correctly and provide intended benefits when collected.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Navigate towards spawned power-ups and collect them. Verify that magnet effect attracts food and shield effect prevents death from collisions.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Power-ups are collected successfully, their effects activate for the specified duration, and they provide strategic advantages as designed.
